titles.title: All I Want is More of You

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: All I want is more of You All I want is more of You Nothing I desire, Lord But more of You. All I want is more of You All I want is more of You Nothing I desire, Lord But more of You.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Jesus I am thirsty, Won't You come and fill me Earthly things that left me dry Only You can satisfy All I want is more of You.
